# testing/utility/coffee-parser.utility

JSON parsing and type-guard utilities for Coffee entities in test assertions.

## Functions

| Function                                                  | Description                                                                          |
| --------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| [isCoffee](functions/isCoffee.md)                         | Type guard that validates whether an unknown value conforms to the Coffee interface. |
| [parseCoffeeJson](functions/parseCoffeeJson.md)           | Parses a JSON string and validates it as a single Coffee entity.                     |
| [parseCoffeeArrayJson](functions/parseCoffeeArrayJson.md) | Parses a JSON string and validates it as an array of Coffee entities.                |
